castle.strategic_description: This civ is versatile, with strength across Ranged and Infantry -- allowing flexible strategies that adapt to any opponent. Strong anti-cavalry defense with Pikeman to hold positions against cavalry pushes. Vulnerable to massed archers -- consider aggressive play before ranged compositions develop. An infantry ram push is the signature play -- use Warrior Priest as a meatshield to protect rams pushing into enemy bases.

imperial.strategic_description: This civ has strong infantry for frontline pressure, with Champion serving as the backbone of siege-backed pushes. Limited counter options mean this civ must play aggressively and press its advantage before opponents can mass their army. Siege options are limited -- look to win through open-field engagements rather than pushing fortifications.

castle.strategic_description: This civ is versatile, with strength across Ranged and Infantry -- allowing flexible strategies that adapt to any opponent. Anti-cavalry options are limited -- beware of knight-heavy opponents. Good skirmishers help shut down archer compositions. An infantry ram push is the signature play -- use Jaguar Warrior as a meatshield to protect rams pushing into enemy bases.

castle.strategic_description: This civ is versatile, with strength across Cavalry and Ranged -- allowing flexible strategies that adapt to any opponent. Limited counter options mean this civ must play aggressively and press its advantage before opponents can mass their army. Solid siege options give flexibility in how to close out games.

imperial.strategic_description: This civ has strong ranged options for concentrated pushes, with Heavy Scorpion providing range advantage and sustained damage output. Limited counter options mean this civ must play aggressively and press its advantage before opponents can mass their army. Pushing behind trebuchets maximizes the ranged advantage -- set up trebs and let Heavy Scorpion protect them.
